title: Model Discovery Infrastructure - Interfaces and Base Adapter
completion_summary: Created types.ts, base-adapter.ts, registry.ts, and index.ts for model discovery infrastructure
acceptance_criteria: ModelProvider interface defined with name, agent, models, and configured fields
ModelAdapter interface defined with discover(), getName(), isConfigured() methods
Base adapter class created with error handling and logging
AdapterRegistry class created to manage multiple adapters
Directory src/model-adapters/ created with index.ts export
